summary: The diff shows that REQ-31 has been fully implemented by replacing the Pacifico cursive font with Inter (a modern sans-serif font) in the Footer component while preserving the footer text and gradient styling. REQ-32 has also been completed - the Pacifico font import was removed from frontend/index.html, and the tailwind.config.js confirms Inter is now the primary font. Both requirements are satisfied with clear evidence in the modified files.

hallucinated_features.description: The font family was changed to Inter and also configured as the default sans-serif font in tailwind.config.js, extending beyond just the Footer component
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly stated 'Do not change the footer text content; Preserve the gradient styling and overall footer layout; Ensure the new font is web-safe or properly imported' and the non-goals included 'Changing footer text or copyright information; Modifying footer size, position, or color scheme; Adding new footer features or links'. While the requirements only mentioned changing the Footer component font, the implementation also modified the global font configuration in tailwind.config.js to make Inter the default sans-serif font application-wide, which was not explicitly requested
